title: OCFS - Ore Compatibility for Skytisfactory
body:
OCFS is a Mod that adds various items, which are missing in many Tech mods.

 

Such as 

- Gear
- Rod
- Plate
- Wire
- Dust
- Crushed Ore
- Crystal
- Coin
 

For Iron, Copper, Nickel, Silver, Gold, Netherite, Lead, Tin, Diamond, Emerald, Invar, Constantan, Bronze, and many more.

 

This Mod adds all missing Resources that are missing from other mods, for better Recipe changes.
